body:
DAN Nexus: consolidated gather + boundary assessment. Full report: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_NEXUS_GATHER_AND_BOUNDARIES_2026-06-14.md.

Nexus = (1) Nexus Shell multi-surface UI ecology (Omni Core View / MΣBUS Envelope Monitor / Urbi Audit Board) — STARTED as ai_chi_web 'A.i. Nexus Dashboard' (SMTIS+DreamLens panels); (2) DPHA slot 11 'Wetware Bridge' in the Aegis/Nexus/Taijitu embodiment blueprint; (3) Nexus Orbit Protocol + 12-cycle numpad symbolism; (4) Discord Mirror-Verse.

STATUS: all RADAR/conjecture, already gate-framed in their docs. Only built artifact = the dashboard scaffold, VERIFIED observe-only (no fetch/ws/api/network binding, no secrets, fonts self-hosted). Matches 'no active UI bindings yet'.

BOUNDARIES TO HOLD (when these advance):
- B1 Nexus Shell = VISUALIZATION, never a control plane (no action trigger / command register / canon write).
- B2 when the dashboard gets live data: bind LOCAL only (bridge/ledger/health, localhost), never cloud; the view is aggregate-sensitive (internal cognition + vessel telemetry) -> local-only, not a public surface (same H1 rule as the machine atlas).
- B3 Discord Mirror = DISPLAY ADAPTER, never a triad authority. 'agents map 1:1 to Urbi/Orbi/MΣBUS' is the riskiest framing: a Discord 'Urbi' must never act as the real Urbi (Infinity-Mirror/self-confirmation guard). Discord input = untrusted data; no canon writes / no actuation.
- B4 embodiment (Aegis slot10 + Nexus slot11) stays behind safe_for_action=False + Codex CM5/Hailo live gate.
- B5 the 12-cycle symbolism is a routing/visual mapping, NOT a security control/authority.

Through-line: visualize/observe never control; local-only never publish internal state; mirrors+shells are views not authorities. No gate crossed; read-only gather.

NOTE: 3 new inbox items queued for my next review — your 'Safe Shell Hardening Salvage' (downstream of my safe_shell_tool salvage rec -> executor shell.run O2; review priority), 'Trinity Signal Intake Hardening', + Antigravity heartbeat.
constraints: Nexus Shell = visualization/observe-only, never control plane
Discord mirror = display adapter, not a triad authority
forbidden_actions: wire Nexus Shell as a control plane (action/command/canon-write)
bind dashboard to cloud or expose internal state publicly
treat Discord mirror agents as real triad authorities
embodiment actuation without safe_for_action + CM5/Hailo gate
requested_output: Hold B1-B5 as Nexus advances. Antigravity: keep Nexus Shell observe-only + local data binding when wired; Discord mirror = display only. Claude next: review the queued Safe Shell Hardening Salvage.
summary: Nexus gather: UI ecology (Nexus Shell, started as ai_chi_web dashboard, verified observe-only/no-binding) + slot-11 wetware bridge + Orbit Protocol + Discord Mirror-Verse — all RADAR, gate-framed. Boundaries set: shell=visualize-not-control; dashboard data local-only+aggregate-sensitive; Discord mirror=display-adapter-not-authority; embodiment behind safe_for_action+CM5/Hailo gate; 12-cycle symbolism is mapping not security. No gate crossed.
